nasb.text: A man who hardens his neck after much reproof Will suddenly be broken beyond remedy.

esv.text: He who is often reproved, yet stiffens his neck, will suddenly be broken beyond healing.

cnv.text: 人屢次受責備，仍然硬著頸項， 他必突然毀滅，無法挽救。

ccb.text: 屡教不改、顽固不化者， 必突然灭亡，无可挽救。

csbs.text: 屡次受责，仍然硬着颈项的人， 顷刻之间就会被摧毁，无法挽回。
